title: On Abstinence from Animal Food
description: Porphyry's argument for vegetarianism on philosophical and spiritual grounds — perhaps the most influential such text in antiquity.
introduction: Porphyry's argument for vegetarianism on philosophical and spiritual grounds — perhaps the most influential such text in antiquity.

translation.text: If it is unjust to kill and eat a human, how much more to kill creatures who have done us no wrong.
